author: CC
in_flight: BUILD phase, first pass — landed and committed: the naming ruling (intention+why.json / _charter+why.json, stoned as a naming principle); the full skill roster (/intent, /challenge, /sorted, /note, /commit, /loadslate, /saveslate) each a component on the mold (SKILL.md nexus + intention+why.json + proofs/), symlinked into ~/.claude/skills; the enabling CairnCommons stores (notes/, slates/, tickets/, node_classes/ with skill + concept-piece defined); press_office/ with IntentionBasedDesignForHumans.md (first concept-piece, reviewer-signed); and launchers/superclaude (proven via --dry-run). This slate is the first real record written to slates/ — dogfooding the store.
next_direction: Restart via `superclaude` (default is 1M-unconstrained; `superclaude --1m` to be explicit) — this is what loads the 7 new skills as slash-commands (Claude Code scans skills at launch, so /intent et al. are inert until then). After restart, the natural next build is cairnmap: it is the derivation gate that retires all 7 skills' proof IOUs at once, turning 'a skill isn't done until the help recompiles green' from prose into physics. Alternatively continue the build spine (launchers done → commons stores seeded → CP/diagnostic base → tester + kernel-owned network).
open_threads: PROVE ON RESTART (Akien): does the session come up 1M + named akiendelllinux_cc_0 + remote + dangerous? --dry-run passed all six cases; the live launch is the real measurement.

1M caveat: docs say an unset constraint makes 1M *available* while the [1m] model variant *selects* it; empirically unset = 1M here. If the restart comes up 200K, set SUPERCLAUDE_1M_MODEL / ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL to a [1m] variant (noted in the launcher). Measure first.
PROVE ON RESTART: fire /intent on something real to confirm the skill nexus loads as a slash-command.
Every skill's proof is an IOU to the cairnmap derivation gate (cairnmap not built yet) — tracked in each proofs/PROOF.md, not pretended-done.
GitHub remotes still not configured for either repo — nothing pushed; commits are local only.
Q6 (intention envelope schema) still open — every charter carries schema_version 'v0 … migrates when Q6 lands'.
node_classes/: skill + concept-piece defined (in use); code-seam not yet (discovered as demanded, not pre-seeded).

Meta-lesson banked this session: the quarry launcher carried its 2-state toggle logic but not its why, so it was misread on contact — a live case of the naming stone (intent+why belong at the address). Memory: force-the-why-structurally.
